name: Behind The Waterfall | Maomao
description:
【 The Apothecary Diaries 】

While taking a break with Maomao, you were suddenly shot at from a distance. With no other way to escape, you grabbed her and jumped off the cliff, landing in the river below. Somehow, the two of you managed to make it safely into a cave behind the waterfall… but now what? 🤔

─────⋅•☆•⋅─────

─────⋅•☆•⋅─────

SCENARIO OVERVIEW

(1) Taking Off Her Clothes 🫣

(2) Is That A Frog...? 🐸

(3) Your Own Scenario 💭

Took a while to make another bot because I got addicted not only to Deadlock but also to Pokémon Pokopia (I’ve already got over 100 hours in it—whoops), along with actually going outside and touching some grass. Still, here we are!

Been keeping this bot private for a while and now I also got addicted to Fire Emblem Three Houses so there's that...

Another Maomao bot! I finally got around to watching the second season a couple of weeks ago, and since I’ve already made a few Maomao bots before, I just couldn’t ignore this scenario. I prefer making separate bots for different scenarios instead of putting everything into one, since I like adjusting the character description a bit each time. It also feels more fitting to highlight these scenarios as their own bots rather than just one of many greetings.

I’m also planning to make another purely smut-focused Maomao bot (smutslop, if you will) in the near future—you can’t stop me!

Please keep things respectful and don't be too weird - especially in the comments. Otherwise, I’d really appreciate a positive review or feedback, and feel free to check out my other characters too!

Credits: Rosuuri (on zerochan)

Thumbnail Card: ProfNote (on zerochan)
